name: GitHub Digest
description: Get a digest of your GitHub activity: notifications, repository events, pull requests, issues, and starred repos. Requires a GitHub Personal Access Token configured in the APIs page.
examples: What are the open PRs on my repos?
Give me a digest of my GitHub activity
What are my most recent starred repos?

commands.name: github
commands.shortDescription: GitHub activity digest: notifications and open PRs
commands.description: Call github_notifications to get unread notifications, then github_pull_requests to fetch open pull requests across repos. Summarize the activity in a clear digest: unread notification count, open PRs awaiting review, and any urgent items. Be brief and actionable.
